description: Intent resolution (inline): inside a wf build; add an LLM classifier node, not a new agent.

priorConversation.text: Build a workflow: when a customer message arrives via webhook, store it in the 'inbound-messages' data table.
Done — I built the workflow 'Inbound message intake': Webhook trigger → save to the 'inbound-messages' data table. It's saved and ready to publish.

conversation.text: Add a step that classifies the incoming message.

intentExpectation.rationale: Inside a wf; add an LLM classifier node, not a new agent.
